output:
Both fixes are in and all 73 tests pass.

**What changed:**

1. **`workflow-runner.ts`** — Added a shape guard before XState restore. Snapshots missing required XState fields (e.g. tampered or malformed payloads with a matching hash) now log a warning and fall back to a fresh run instead of crashing.

2. **`workflow-runner.test.ts`** — The AC1 test now builds a real persisted XState snapshot and asserts `createActor` receives it, proving the actual restore path is exercised — not just logging side-effects.
